media.description: “I’m definitely grateful for my time in Memphis,” former Grizzlies star Ja Moant said. “That will always be home for me. But, yeah, you know, it’s now time to get to work.”

items.title: Watching the opener, I came away thinking Rob Dillingham might've benefited from Summer League more than I initially thought.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
Watching the opener, I came away thinking Rob Dillingham might've benefited from Summer League more than I initially thought.

The Bulls could've used another organizer offensively, and those would've been meaningful reps for a young point guard.

items.title: Dennis Schroeder’s “better have my money” slap to the face of Luka is still top of the podium. 🥇
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Dennis Schroeder’s “better have my money” slap to the face of Luka is still top of the podium. 🥇 

Bam’s punch on Herro gets the silver medal. 🥈 

The streets keeping score…Ya dig 💯. 

I don’t condone violence. But I do condone the occasional straightenin’

items.title: Nick Nurse reiterated today that he plans to have Labaron Philon in the rotation immediately.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse reiterated today that he plans to have Labaron Philon in the rotation immediately. 

"I think he’s going this direction [up] quickly. And I think he’s got some confidence to him that I don’t think he’ll be afraid. I think he’ll make the most of the opportunity."

items.title: Nick Nurse just met with the Philly reporters who made the trip to Vegas.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Nurse just met with the Philly reporters who made the trip to Vegas. 

On adding Jaylen Brown: "You watch him get a lot better from year to year to year, and how much harder that became to gameplan for him  … He’s sitting in his prime. It’s amazing that he’s going to be a Sixer."

items.title: One thing I'll be tracking with Caleb Wilson over Summer League is his shot profile.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
One thing I'll be tracking with Caleb Wilson over Summer League is his shot profile.

He scored 35 points in his debut, but only three shot attempts came in the paint. 

It'll be interesting to see whether that was Memphis, the spacing around him or simply how the game unfolded.

items.title: The Phoenix win showed what the Sky can look like when their defensive identity shows up.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The Phoenix win showed what the Sky can look like when their defensive identity shows up.

The loss in Los Angeles was a reminder of how difficult it has been for them to sustain that level from game to game.
